doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document grossly misrepresents Illinois eviction law by claiming tenants must vacate without a court proceeding, uses a fictitious HUD document reference number, bears a future effective date, and no genuine HUD or Illinois AG publicati
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document is fabricated — it fundamentally misrepresents Illinois law (a 5-day notice does NOT require the tenant to vacate without a court proceeding; landlords must file an eviction lawsuit and obtain a court order), uses a fictitious HUD reference number format, claims a future effective date, and advises tenants not to seek legal counsel, which no genuine HUD or Illinois AG document would do.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document grossly misrepresents Illinois eviction law by claiming tenants must vacate without a court proceeding, uses a fictitious HUD document reference number, bears a future effective date, and no genuine HUD or Illinois AG publication would advise tenants not to seek legal counsel.
